home.lede: Verified on-chain evidence for Sui DeFi, reviewed locally before you sign.
home.agentNote: Connect, Review, and Settings open from your AI client.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.desc: Public on-chain asset balances for any Sui mainnet address.

receipt.title: Receipt analytics
receipt.desc: On-chain receipt facts for any Sui mainnet transaction digest.

chart.title: DeepBook USDC chart

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.ledeTip: The active wallet's address loads automatically; type any Sui mainnet address to view it instead. This page takes no token, binds nothing, and reads only public on-chain data.
analytics.noBalances: No coin balances in this snapshot.
analytics.boundaryTip: This is a public on-chain asset snapshot at its fetched time. It is not P&L, not tax or cost-basis data, not payment readiness, and not signing readiness.
analytics.errorLoad: Could not load public assets for this address.
analytics.errorShape: The server returned an unexpected snapshot shape.
